case_title: FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC VS. KWI LEE et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - LEASE, FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, KWI DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, KWI

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, KWI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1410 STEINER ST. #PH1H, S.F. CA. 94115, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC SERVED APR-19-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, KWI

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY FULLY SATISFIED AS TO PLAINTIFF'S POSSESSION ONLY WITH ACCRUED COST OF $85.00. AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, KWI

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, KWI
